summary: Iteration 20 - Major UX Refactor Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Welcome page with brand logo, hero carousel, chi siamo section, teal CTA buttons. (2) Login page with brand logo, teal submit button, form works. (3) 5-item sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione, Ricerca, Supporto) with always-visible labels. (4) Active nav state with teal left accent bar. (5) Dashboard with greeting, guidance text, critical alert, quick actions, 'Urgente Ora' section, 'In Attesa di Approvazione' section, practice table with PRIORITA/STATO/AZIONE columns. (6) Search page with search input and results filtering. (7) Support page with 5 FAQ accordions and contact info. (8) Practice Detail with guidance hints based on status (draft/waiting_approval/blocked), compact agent pipeline with 'Attivita Agenti' button, modal with 4 phases (Analisi, Conformita, Documenti, Esecuzione), chat suggestions. (9) Navigation between all 5 pages works correctly. All UI in Italian.
critical_code_review_comments: 5-item navigation correctly implemented with data-testid attributes (nav-dashboard, nav-practices, nav-email-center, nav-search, nav-support)
Active nav state uses teal (#0ABFCF) left accent bar with font-semibold styling
HerionLogo component correctly loads brand image from customer assets URL
AgentPipeline component has compact summary view with expandable modal showing 4 phases
Guidance hints correctly display based on practice status (draft, waiting_approval, blocked)
Chat suggestions use data-testid='chat-suggestion-0/1/2' for testing
All UI text is in Italian as required
Lighter visual style achieved with white backgrounds and soft borders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested the major UX refactor. All features verified: (1) Welcome page: brand logo (HerionBrand component), hero carousel with 5 slides, 'Chi siamo' section, teal CTA buttons (#0ABFCF). (2) Login page: brand logo, teal submit button, form works with cookie-based auth. (3) 5-item sidebar: Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione, Ricerca, Supporto - all with always-visible labels and hint text. (4) Active nav state: teal left accent bar (3px wide, #0ABFCF) + font-semibold. (5) Dashboard: 'Ciao, {name}' greeting, guidance text, critical alert with 'Risolvi ora' button, quick actions (Nuova Pratica + Comunicazione), 'Urgente Ora' section (3 urgent practices), 'In Attesa di Approvazione' section (1 practice), 'Tutte le Pratiche' table with NOME/PRIORITA/STATO/AZIONE columns. (6) Search page: search input with placeholder, results filtering by client name/practice type/fiscal code/VAT number, results show priority badges. (7) Support page: 5 FAQ accordions (data-testid='faq-0' to 'faq-4'), contact email (support@herion.it), chat in practice info, 'Guida completa' section. (8) Practice Detail: guidance hints for draft ('Avvia il workflow'), waiting_approval ('Verifica il riepilogo e approva'), blocked ('Pratica bloccata'); compact agent pipeline with progress bar and 'Attivita Agenti' button; modal with 4 phases (Analisi, Conformita, Documenti, Esecuzione); chat suggestions ('Cosa devo fare adesso?', 'Manca qualcosa?', 'Qual e lo stato?'). (9) Navigation: all 5 nav items work correctly, routes are /dashboard, /practices, /email-center, /search, /support.

details: 5 nav items: Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione, Ricerca, Supporto
Hint text visible on inactive items

Icon color changes to teal on active

'In Attesa di Approvazione' section with 1 practice
Results show client name, practice type, priority badges

Compact summary view with progress bar
Modal opens with 4 phases: Analisi, Conformita, Documenti, Esecuzione
